overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing the protagonist Jin Sakai walking through a vibrant field of purple flowers alongside a misty river in a mountainous landscape. The character moves from a wooded area onto a rocky riverbank, with cinematic overcast lighting highlighting the vivid purple and yellow colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of purple flowers with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dense field of purple flowers among deciduous trees, heading toward a distant river

entered.detail: vibrant purple flowers covering the ground throughout the scene
tall trees with green leaves scattered throughout the field
steep rocky mountain face visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense field of vibrant purple flowers interspersed with trees. A mountain cliff looms in the hazy distance on the left as the character moves forward through the natural landscape.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to rocky riverbank as the river comes into view
on-screen text appears identifying the location as KUSHI RIVER

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverbank, approaching and passing a distinctive twisted tree growing from the water

entered.detail: calm blue river flowing alongside the path, becoming more prominent
gnarled tree with twisted trunk growing at the water's edge
rocky and gravelly shoreline along the river's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to reveal the river as the character steps onto the rocky riverbank. A distinctive twisted tree stands at the water's edge on the right, while the mountain cliff becomes more prominent on the left. The location name 'KUSHI RIVER' appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with mountain cliff

events.description: character passes the twisted tree and continues along the winding river path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank with steep mountain cliffs on the left and open water on the right, heading toward distant trees

entered.detail: line of trees visible in the far distance across the river

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the riverbank past the twisted tree, with the mountain cliff now looming closer on the left. The river stretches ahead toward a distant forest line, with the rocky shore extending along the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense floral meadow toward the open expanse of a rocky riverbank. It begins with the character walking through a vibrant field of purple flowers and scattered trees, with a hazy mountain cliff looming in the distance. As the character moves forward, the landscape opens up to reveal the Kushi River, shifting the terrain from soft blossoms to a rugged shore marked by a distinctive twisted tree at the water's edge. The scene then expands as the camera follows the character past the tree, bringing the towering mountain cliff into sharper focus on the left. Finally, the view stretches along the rocky shoreline toward a distant forest line where the river disappears into the horizon.
